packages.label: anthropic
packages.caveat: Counts via pypistats — third-party aggregator over the public PyPI BigQuery downloads dataset; values can lag the underlying day by 24-48h.

packages.label: ollama
packages.caveat: Daily values are derived as day-over-day diffs of a 30-day cumulative counter — noisier than a direct daily counter but the most honest signal Homebrew exposes.

packages.label: Codeium.codeium
packages.caveat: Daily values are derived from day-over-day diffs of the cumulative install counter exposed by Microsoft's marketplace catalogue. install ≠ active use — auto-installed bundle extensions, CI runners, and codespace pre-warms inflate the absolute number, but the WoW Δ signal is consistent.
